description: The Okinawa-Kyokuryū-kai is a yakuza criminal organization based on the Okinawa island of Japan. Formed in 1990 after splitting from the Kyokuryu-kai, it is a designated yakuza group with an estimated 300 active members. It is the largest yakuza organization in Okinawa Prefecture, headquartered in Naha, and its official policy forbids drug trafficking.
